title: JSON path compiler accepts invalid input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE json_test (id UInt64, data String NOT NULL, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, JSONExtractString(data, 'name') AS name FROM json_test WHERE JSONExtractInt(data, 'value') > 100;
ALTER TABLE json_test UPDATE data = JSONSet(data, 'new_key', 'new_value') WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: JSON path compiler accepts invalid JSON input
